title: ScopeManifest
description: Enterprise-grade authorization and safety boundary definition for AI-assisted security research.

program.description: Name of the program or organization.

authorization_url.description: HTTPS URL providing written public or private authorization evidence.

authorization_confirmed.description: Must be set to true by a human after manually reviewing policy.

assets.description: Explicitly authorized hostnames or IP addresses. Wildcards must be resolved to specific domains.

excluded_assets.description: Specifically excluded hostnames, IPs, or endpoints.

prohibited_tests.description: Prohibited test classes. Must include the baseline security restrictions.

max_requests_per_second.description: Request rate budget for automation. Hard ceiling of 10.0 RPS.

required_header.description: Custom HTTP header required by policy to identify research traffic.

accounts_owned.description: Number of owned accounts prepared. Minimum of 2 required for authorization testing.
